reason: Terminal tab hook notification state belongs in transient Zustand state and must not be persisted.
TerminalTabs UI change should follow existing component/styling patterns and avoid unnecessary component churn.
New hook event payload and tab notification state require explicit TypeScript types.
Backend changes add local Tauri-side hook receiver and PTY environment injection, so Rust boundary guidance applies.
Feature spans PowerShell hook script, Rust receiver, Tauri event, Zustand state, and React tab UI.
